title: Assassin’s Creed Shadows
shortDescription: Experience an epic action-adventure story set in feudal Japan! Become a lethal shinobi assassin and powerful legendary samurai as you explore a beautiful open world in a time of chaos.
detailedDescriptionHtml:
MASTER THE DEEPEST STEALTH MECHANISMS OF THE SERIES & FIGHT IN VISCERAL COMBAT

“Shadows is some of the most fun I’ve had with a stealth game in a decade” —PC Gamer

Play as Naoe, a quick-witted shinobi, and use light, sound, and shadows to evade detection. Infiltrate enemy strongholds with many parkour options including the new grappling hook, distract guards with shuriken or smoke bombs, and assassinate your targets with your Hidden Blade. As the samurai Yasuke, use silent bow takedowns or unleash devastating melee combos with your katana or naginata.

Switch between these two heroes to adapt your strategy and experience feudal Japan through two radically different approaches – stealth and strength, shadows and steel.

DEEP-DIVE INTO THE CAPTIVATING WORLD OF ASSASSIN'S CREED SHADOWS

“Assassin’s Creed Shadows creates one of the best versions of the open-world style.” —IGN

Step into feudal Japan like never before! From majestic castle towns to serene shrines and sweeping countryside, Assassin’s Creed Shadows offers a breathtaking open world where dynamic seasons, shifting weather, and environmental destruction affect your tactical approach.

And, to get full immersion, experience the game through Japanese voiceover.

DISCOVER THE MOST TECHNICALLY ADVANCED ASSASSIN’S CREED GAME YET

“It leads to one of the most dynamic, fun, and best-looking open-world games I’ve played this generation.” —Kotaku

Experience a true next-gen leap with Assassin’s Creed Shadows, powered by the updated Anvil engine. Explore a world brought to life with ray-traced Global Illumination, real-time reflections, virtualized geometry, and dynamic wind and environmental particles.

From the shimmer of lantern light on rain-slick rooftops to the rustle of cherry blossoms in the wind, every detail is crafted to immerse you deeper into feudal Japan.

A GLOBAL HIT

Whether you are a veteran Assassin’s Creed player or new to the franchise, feudal Japan awaits you! Join a community of millions of players and discover a title GameSpot describes as "an absolute blast to play," Eurogamer.es as "the best Assassin's Creed of the modern era" and GamingTrend as “the new benchmark for the series.”

supportedLanguagesHtml:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Arabic, Japanese*, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Polish
*languages with full audio support

pcRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:

  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: INTEL® Core TM i7 8700K AMD RYZEN 5 3600
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GEFORCE GTX 1650 4GB / AMD RX-5500 XT 8GB / INTEL® ARC TM A380 6GB (REBAR ON)"
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 115 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: The game must be installed on a SSD.
pcRequirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5 11600k/AMD Ryzen™ 5 5600x
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia® GeForce RTX™ 3060Ti 8GB/AMD Radeon™ RX 6700 XT 12GB/Intel® Arc™ B580 12GB (REBAR ON)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 115 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: The game must be installed on a SSD.

newsItems.title: AC Black Flag Resynced out now!
newsItems.author: CRM_OP******
newsItems.contents:
Ahoy pirates!
Land is finally in sight as Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced looms on the horizon. With launch today on Steam and Steam Deck, we wanted to make sure you have every detail you could possibly need to get prepped to start the game. We’ll be covering release information, content, specs, tech, and more so read for everything you need to know!

[previewyoutube=PuC4vB0kLvw;full][/previewyoutube]
Launch is here, with Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced releasing today on Steam and Steam Deck. In case you’ve been stranded on a desert island the last few months, Black Flag Resynced is a ground-up remake of the iconic adventure of Edward Kenway, Assassin-Pirate extraordinaire. Enhanced, improved, and reworked as a modern experience while staying true to the beloved original, you’ll return to the Caribbean to experience Edward’s rise from peasant to privateer to pirate to Assassin and every twist and turn along the way. 

[previewyoutube=PhQ3yQjUgAc;full][/previewyoutube]
[h3]Editions[/h3]
There are multiple editions available to suit your budget and provide you with extra content, check them out:
[list]
[*]Standard Edition (59.99 €/$)
[list]
[*]Digital copy of the game.
[/list]
[*]Deluxe Edition (69.99 €/$)
[list]
[*]Digital copy of the game.
[*]Digital download: Master Assassin Character pack – sword, pistol, and trinket each with a unique perk, and costume for Edward.
[*]Digital download: Master Assassin Naval pack – sail set, ship's pet, crew attire, wheel, figurehead, and hull trim.
[/list][/list][img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/46094181/5c8a5bd6316db7fb3d5cdd95cc92dc5aa47ea624.jpg[/img]
[h3]PC Features[/h3]
[list]
[*]Fully playable offline after installation
[*]Built on an optimized and scalable engine
[*]Supports: 
[list]
[*]Upscaling technologies
[*]Frame generation
[*]Software ray tracing for non-RT hardware
[/list][*]Includes graphics presets for handheld devices[/list]
[h3]PC Specs[/h3]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/5181127/08578834e7228b1206e0a9d6ded2abbdf0916afa.jpg[/img]
[h3]Steam Features[/h3]
[list]
[*][b]Steam Deck Verified[/b] from day one for a smooth handheld experience
[*][b][url=http://assassinscreed.com/black-flag-resynced/steam_achievements]Steam achievements[/url][/b] to unlock
[*][b][url=http://assassinscreed.com/bfr/steam-badges-&-trading-cards]Steam collectibles[/url][/b] to earn and trade 
[/list]
For even more detailed descriptions, footage, and a deeper look at everything that’s waiting for you in Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, check out our [url=https://news.ubisoft.com/en-us/article/2SslOS0ZO4iBLFKpTJgpzo/assassins-creed-black-flag-resynced-deep-dive-into-parkour-stealth-combat]deep dives into parkour, stealth, combat,[/url] one on [url=https://news.ubisoft.com/en-us/article/2ld4JIABg5aOvoiUlJlUWF/assassins-creed-black-flag-resynced-deep-dive-into-the-naval-gameplay]naval gameplay[/url], and a third on some of the [url=https://www.ubisoft.com/en-us/game/assassins-creed/news/6aJBSaTUE9LfgyIQyHkeTF/deep-dive-3-expanding-on-the-original]new and updated features[/url] coming to Resynced. Buy the game now on Steam and enjoy the Caribbean like never before!. See you aboard the Jackdaw, pirates!

https://store.steampowered.com/app/3751950/Assassins_Creed_Black_Flag_Resynced/

newsItems.title: Assassin's Creed Shadows' final update adds one last story mission and a wearable Black Flag Resynced advert
newsItems.contents:
Mostly decent open-world ninja sim Assassin’s Creed Shadows is getting its last big update today, as Ubisoft begin the process of shooing players away from the year-old RPG and towards the gleaming, nipple-adding newness of Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag Resynced. The Shadows patch even includes an unlockable outfit based on Edward Kenway’s pirate garb, displaced only 150 or so years out of its appropriate time period for your synergistic brand awareness pleasure.

Read more

newsItems.title: AC Shadows Title Update 1.1.11 - Release Notes
newsItems.author: Ubi_Grogu
newsItems.contents:
[p][b]UPDATE: Title Update 1.1.11 will be released on Switch 2 this Friday, June 19th at 14:00 UTC. Thank you for your patience![/b] [/p][p]-[/p][p]Hello everyone,[/p][p align="start"]Tomorrow, June 16th, we will be releasing Title Update 1.1.11 for Assassin’s Creed Shadows @ 14:00 UTC / 10:00 AM EST / 7:00 AM PST.[/p][p align="start"]Want to discuss the Title Update with your fellow community members? Why not join our official [url="https://discord.com/invite/ac"]Assassin’s Creed Discord server[/url]?
Thank you to everyone who has taken the time to report issues to us via the [url="https://www.ubisoft.com/en-us/game/assassins-creed/shadows/bug-reporter"]Bug reporter[/url]. As always, you can contact our [url="https://redirection.ubisoft.com/site/entrance?entrance=support.ubi.com/"]support team[/url] if you run into any trouble.[/p][p]
[/p][h2]Patch Sizes:[/h2][list][*][p]Xbox Series X|S: 26.1 GB[/p][/*][*][p]PlayStation®5: 10.01 GB[/p][/*][*][p]Nintendo Switch™ 2: 9.5 GB[/p][/*][*][p]PC: 21.69 GB[/p][/*][*][p]Steam: 10 GB[/p][/*][*][p]MAC: 9 GB[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h2]PATCH HIGHLIGHTS:[/h2][h3]New Free Story Quest: Black Tides[/h3][p align="start"][i]A new threat washes ashore![/i][/p][p align="start"]Two elite-level Templars known as "Black Cross" are called to Japan to hunt Naoe and Yasuke for all the trouble they have caused. But as is often the case with the Templar Order, those Black Cross may have additional goals of their own: It's up to our two protagonists to prevent them from acquiring whatever they seek - and manage to stay alive...[/p][p align="start"]Conditions for Black Tides[/p][list][*][p]Complete Naoe & Yasuke's main story[/p][/*][*][p]Complete "A Critical Encounter" post-launch quest[/p][/*][*][p]Complete "A Puzzlement" post-launch quest[/p][/*][/list][p align="start"][/p][previewyoutube="xfnoZgM0rpY;full"][/previewyoutube][p]
[/p][h3]New Crossover Projects: Riptides & Undertow[/h3][p align="start"]We’re releasing two new crossover Projects available in the Animus HUB called Riptides and Undertow, in which you can unlock new themed [b]outfits, weapons, trinkets and more![/b][/p][p align="start"]To activate the new Projects, complete Anomalies and progress through the rewards like previously released ones. These include rewards for both Shadows and Black Flag Resynced and can be progressed by completing Anomalies from both games.[/p][p align="start"][b]Note:[/b] Unfortunately, these will not be available on Nintendo Switch 2 as it contains crossover content with Black Flag Resynced, which will not be releasing for Nintendo.[/p][p][/p][p align="start"][img src="https://preview-staticctf.ubisoft.com/dwxVXsNqnydGrw88EMJIpsItBvp1bB36/1Jww4L2lhSo8OM9atcDCzz/85c8c15a301f346ca8a8d2d9c31ea1e9/-ACSH-_AC_Shadows_Title_Update_1.1.11_-_Release_Notes-TU15_ProjectRiptidesUndertow_WaterMark.jpg" style="background-repeat: no-repeat; box-sizing: inherit; vertical-align: middle; border-style: none; max-width: 100%;"][/img][/p][p][/p][h3]New End-game Feature: Domains[/h3][p align="start"][i]A brand-new Animus activity that will put your RPG build crafting skills to the test as you tackle 5 new gameplay simulations across 10 challenge levels.[/i][/p][p align="start"][b]Unlock conditions:[/b] Reach level 30[/p][p][/p][previewyoutube="K1l8DXBrLkI;full"][/previewyoutube][p align="start"][/p][p][/p][p align="start"]MOD, an Assassin hacker, has created a new type of simulation called “Domains.” These trials are designed to help the Dark Animus users sharpen their combat and survival skills. Those who can rise to the challenge can earn dozens of new and remixed outfits, weapons, trinkets and engravings.[/p][p align="start"]The higher the difficulty, the more gameplay modifiers will be applied. The goal is to push you out of your comfort zone and make you rethink your loadouts. A strategy that works in one Domain may not in the next. [i]“Time to get those Mythic and Artifact upgrades you’ve been putting off!”[/i][/p][p align="start"]MOD has an exclusive shop and in-game currency you can use to purchase new end-game gear sets, new powerful engravings, and a progression tree to support the Domain’s increasing challenges. As you push through higher difficulties, MOD will reward you with weapons and armors that longtime Animus users may recognize.[/p][p align="start"]And you will need it all if you want to beat the hardest challenge levels (and get the secret rewards along the way!)[/p][p align="start"][b]Note:[/b] None of these items will ever be in the store or the exchange. These are Domain-exclusive, for bragging rights only![/p][p][/p][p align="start"][img src="https://preview-staticctf.ubisoft.com/dwxVXsNqnydGrw88EMJIpsItBvp1bB36/2ZCZoNdtpLxEyM0SS6Q9KQ/f228de340c0095d609f7e3fb002ce4e9/-ACSH-_AC_Shadows_Title_Update_1.1.11_-_Release_Notes-TU15_Domains_Rewards.jpg" style="background-repeat: no-repeat; box-sizing: inherit; vertical-align: middle; border-style: none; max-width: 100%;"][/img][/p][h3]New Animus Rift: Horizon[/h3][p align="start"]Another Rift has opened to reveal trouble stirring in its depths.[/p][p align="start"]The Eagle has more information to share about the Guide.[/p][p][/p][p align="start"][img src="https://preview-staticctf.ubisoft.com/dwxVXsNqnydGrw88EMJIpsItBvp1bB36/6xOhiKEc7GhmautHbReUEr/368f3b2a700ed45b5380033e364a3835/Rift3_Screenshot_wWatermark.jpg" style="background-repeat: no-repeat; box-sizing: inherit; vertical-align: middle; border-style: none; max-width: 100%;"][/img][/p][p][/p][p align="start"][b]Note:[/b] You must complete the two previous Animus Rifts to access the New one: Horizon.[/p][p]
[/p][h2]Additional Highlights:[/h2][h3]Quality of Life HUB Improvements[/h3][p align="start"][i]Change to the access to Animus HUB features in the main menu.[/i][/p][p align="start"]We've changed the access to the HUB features in the main menu to harmonize with how they are accessed from gameplay. The System menu will now only be accessible through the Shadows' Memory page.[/p][p]
[/p][h2]Bug Fixes & Improvements[/h2][h3]Gameplay[/h3][list][*][p]Damage increase for “Shurikens” fired from the “Bank Shot” and “Triple Threat” tools mastery upgrade.\[JF4.1][/p][/*][*][p]All abilities that destroy enemy armor are now half as effective when used against bosses.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue preventing the “weak point attacks from making enemies vulnerable a second time” engraving from unlocking correctly.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where Yasuke’s knowledge bonus that granted damage reduction against melee or ranged attacks had no effect.[/p][/*][*][p]Enemies now take fall damage from shorter heights, resulting in more overall fall damage.[/p][/*][*][p]Damage from “Poison Kunai” thrown by enemies is reduced.[/p][/*][*][p]Damage from “Explosive Grenades” thrown by enemies is reduced.\[JF5.1][/p][/*][*][p]Up to 6 “Corrupted Castles” are now available each season.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue with Naoe’s “Katana Sheath” being stuck to her.[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h3]UI[/h3][list][*][p]Forge engraving lists have been reordered, and a new “Critical Category” has been added.\[JF6.1][/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where some perks are shown in the wrong forge category engraving list.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where some perks and knowledge skills displayed the wrong icons.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the “Damage when Hitting Vulnerable Enemies” perk was missing from the stat sheet.[/p][/*][*][p]Naoe’s “Peasant Hat Headgear” perk now has extra text in the stat sheet clarifying it only triggers when below 1 adrenaline.\[JF7.1][/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where Yasuke’s knowledge bonus “Damage with Combo Enders” showed a value 10 times higher than intended in the stat sheet.[/p][/*][*][p]Pins and world markers are now saved through travels in Japan and Awaji.[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h3]Gears & Perks[/h3][list][*][p]Perks listed below have been reworked to a % of an adrenaline chunk and have been rebalanced to a lower value:[/p][list][*][p]Adrenaline Tools[/p][/*][*][p]Adrenaline on Headshot[/p][/*][*][p]Adrenaline on Critical Hit[/p][/*][*][p]Adrenaline over half health[/p][/*][*][p]Adrenaline under half health[/p][/*][*][p]Adrenaline on afflicted enemies[/p][/*][*][p]Adrenaline on posture attack[/p][/*][*][p]Adrenaline on vulnerable enemies[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Perk present on “Whisper of Gold Long Katana” now increases ability damage by 100% (up from 50%).[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where Naoe’s “Kusarigama” perk “Affliction on Entangled Enemy” dealt lower damage than intended when triggering bleed with entanglement.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue with “Blade of Yumminess” missing from inventory in some cases.[/p][/*][*][p]“Teppo” and “Bow” weapons can now be engraved with armour damage and armour piercing perks.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the “Arrownomics Bow” perk could be engraved on amulets.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the “Golden Chamber Teppo” perk could be engraved on amulets.[/p][/*][*][p]Perk present on Naoe’s “Ethereal Cloth Headgear” now triggers when health is below 15% (up from 10%).[/p][/*][*][p]Perk present on Naoe’s “Pink Petal Kosode Light Armour” and Yasuke’s “Sakura Bloom Armour” now converts adrenaline to 20% health on death (up from 10%).[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue to prevent Yasuke’s “Riddle Scroll Beacon Trinket Perk” from reverting to default perk.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where “Consecutive Enemy Kills” perk would not reset when combat ended.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where “Consecutive Enemy Kills” perk would reset upon being damaged.[/p][/*][*][p]Perks with the condition “with backstab” can now correctly only be engraved on “Tanto” weapons.[/p][/*][*][p]Perks with conditions such as “with ranged weapons”, “with headshots”, and “while stationary” can no longer be engraved on melee weapons, where they would have no effect.[/p][/*][*][p]Perks with conditions such as “with melee weapons”, “with posture”, “with combo ender”, “when hitting multiple enemies” can no longer be engraved on ranged weapons, where they would have no effect.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where some perks affecting affliction duration or granting adrenaline didn’t have their effect increased when engraved on enhanced items.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed an issue where the “Critical Change with Melee Weapons” perk could be engraved on armours instead of helmets.[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h2]SPOILERS AHEAD![/h2][h3]Quests[/h3][list][*][p][b]“Gather Mon”:[/b] Fixed the “Anomaly Quest” progression issue.[/p][/*][*][p][b]“Way of the Blacksmith”:[/b] Fixed an issue where “Heji and the forge” have been removed from the hideout and his quest is not available.[/p][/*][*][p][b]“Lost and Found”:[/b] Fixed an issue where Sentinel B-Ser.0197 is teleported out of bounds.[/p][/*][/list][p]
[/p][h2]PLATFORM SPECIFIC[/h2][h3]Nintendo Switch 2[/h3][list][*][p]GPU performance improvements in handheld mode.[/p][/*][/list]

newsItems.title: For The Creed Returns in For Honor with 3 Assassins!
newsItems.author: CRM_OP******
newsItems.contents:
[h2]FOR THE CREED RETURNS IN FOR HONOR[/h2]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45310381/e2ba5bc2811af9e80d1ea41108d98e6d3e8ab9a2.gif[/img]
From April 23 to May 14, Abstergo invites you to reconnect with the genetic memories of legendary heroes and bring their past into your present.
Play the limited-time For The Creed Throwback Even in For Honor.

[previewyoutube=JZ_x1cY0XwI;full][/previewyoutube]

[h2]Naoe, Yasuke & Eivor get their Hero Skins[/h2]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45310381/4beceea549eb735939f97feef1e6ae4dee867c08.jpg[/img]
Channel the strength of Eivor Wolf‑Kissed, the agility of Naoe the Swift, and the power of Yasuke the Brave, three new Hero Skins with custom audio and signature drop attacks.

https://store.steampowered.com/app/4418510
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4418540
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4418560

newsItems.title: Tune in NOW for the Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Showcase!
newsItems.author: Ubi_Grogu
newsItems.contents: [p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45310381/da193a7844d963f695a3805c459427fd933dbfa3.jpg"][/img][/p][p]We're live pirates! Join us now on [url="https://youtu.be/7hkFaTypP1Q"]YouTube[/url] or [url="https://www.twitch.tv/ubisoft/"]Twitch[/url] as we show you what we've got under our sleeves![/p]

items.description: Master the way of the shinobi
Master the way of the samurai
Engrave your first weapon
Perform a landing roll
Escape conflict by using a breathing reed to hide in shallow water
Distract the same enemy 3 times with shinobi bells
Stay airborne by swinging from one grappling hook point to another
Perform a leap of faith from a grappling hook swing
Perform your first assassination
Assassinate an enemy through a shoji door
Perform 5 assassinations in a row without being noticed or entering combat
Assassinate a powerful guardian in one go
Perform your first Finisher as Yasuke
Parry an incoming projectile
Use Samurai Stand before performing a Finisher on an enemy
Kick an enemy from a high place
Perform a Finisher on an enemy that is both Poisoned and Dazed
Sheath your weapon immediately after an enemy dies from Bleed
Shoot an enemy in the knee with an arrow
Defeat the final enemy in the tournament
Complete your first kofun
Complete your first kata
Complete all Kuji-kiri
Complete all legendary sumi-e
Unlock the Hideout
Add a sumi-e to the Hideout
Fully upgrade a building in the Hideout
Adopt a pet
Reach the highest point on the map
Visit every province on the map
Gather information using a scout
Complete a contract in each province
Reach Level 80
Reach Knowledge Rank 10
Obtain two golden katana
Eliminate all targets in Awaji (Claws of Awaji)
Equip a Legendary Bo (Claws of Awaji)
Eliminate an enemy after using all three postures of the Bo in a single combat (Claws of Awaji)
Kill 5 enemies with one single Wind Slash strike (Claws of Awaji)
Eliminate 7 enemies through one single use of Windstep (Claws of Awaji)
Complete all Landscape Sumi-e in Awaji (Claws of Awaji)
Reach Hideout level 13
Train Kinu and Kane
Complete 5 Corrupted Castles
Defeat the Templars
Activate an Exploit
Complete a Challenge Level 10 Domain
